apiToken.title: AmpleData API key
apiToken.description: Optional. Bring your own AmpleData API key (sk_live_...) to be billed on your own account balance. If left empty, runs use the actor's built-in key (paid runs). Generate a key at https://api.ampledata.io account settings; it is stored encrypted and never shared.

csv.title: CSV content
csv.description: Inline CSV to enrich. First row must be the header. Ignored when CSV URL is set.

csvUrl.title: CSV URL
csvUrl.description: URL of a CSV file to download and enrich. Takes precedence over inline CSV.

columns.title: Columns to enrich
columns.description: Columns AmpleData should fill in. Each item: { name, type, description }. type is one of string|number|boolean|date.

keyColumns.title: Key columns
keyColumns.description: Columns that identify each row (e.g. company name). Leave empty to let AmpleData pick.

keyColumnDescription.title: Key column description
keyColumnDescription.description: Optional plain-English description of what the key column holds.

rowLimit.title: Row limit
rowLimit.description: Maximum number of rows to process. Processes all rows if not set.

pollIntervalSecs.title: Poll interval (seconds)
pollIntervalSecs.description: How often to poll job progress.

insecureTLS.title: Disable TLS verification
insecureTLS.description: Skip TLS certificate verification. Only enable for a self-hosted AmpleData endpoint with a self-signed certificate. Insecure — do not use against production.
